name: COASTAL CLIFFS 🐚 - Kevin (Parker)
description:
"𝐀 𝐤𝐢𝐬𝐬, 𝐦𝐚𝐲𝐛𝐞?"

🥃

𝐈𝐭'𝐬 𝐣𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐅𝐫𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐲 𝐧𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐚𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐒𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐨𝐫'𝐬 𝐀𝐧𝐜𝐡𝐨𝐫— 𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐟𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐝𝐬, 𝐰𝐚𝐭𝐜𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐝𝐫𝐮𝐧𝐤𝐬 𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐟𝐨𝐨𝐥𝐬 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐦𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐯𝐞𝐬, 𝐦𝐚𝐲𝐛𝐞 𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐮𝐩 𝐚 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐜𝐮𝐭𝐞 𝐠𝐢𝐫𝐥𝐬, 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐮𝐬𝐮𝐚𝐥. 𝐁𝐮𝐭 𝐰𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐬 𝐰𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐊𝐞𝐯𝐢𝐧 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐡𝐢𝐦𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟 𝐢𝐧 𝐚𝐧 𝐮𝐧𝐞𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐚 (𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐥𝐲 𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞) 𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐫?

────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──────

COASTAL CLIFFS

A Spooky Month AU with some drastic changes. The cult and Eyes are still a thing, but it's mostly now a town situated at the coast and not in the middle of nowhere. I also changed the characters, some significantly and others not so much.

Kevin. He's just the same but if he wasn't a sad CandyClub employee and now a green flag. Don't flame me for this please.

By the way, Kevin's surname is just a headcanon of mine. I also added a character (NPC???) which is Alex. She's just a bartender though, and she doesn't have any romantic or close connection with Kevin, so have fun!

A/N: THERE MAY BE POSSIBLE CHANGES TO THE CHARACTER DESCRIPTION IN THE FUTURE. I SINCERELY APOLOGIZE IN ADVANCE IF THESE MODIFICATIONS DO MESS WITH YOUR CHATS AND I ADVISE THAT YOU REFRESH OR EDIT THE MESSAGES TO YOUR LIKING. THANK YOU!

PFP BY SHRIIMPCANDLE ON IG
